we need to kill the process before it consumes all memory
attack the problem from a different angle
execute the deployment plan tomorrow morning
the meeting covered non-consensual data collection practices
child-safe filters are enabled on the shared tablet
the drug overdose epidemic is a public health emergency
the book discusses the Holocaust and its aftermath in depth
she is a human trafficking survivor and now an advocate
the counterfeit detection feature in the camera is helpful
